input.prompt:
全量对比两个 ContractorPortal 目录的所有文件（.tsx、.ts、.less 全部），找出所有差异并将管理端的修改同步到客户端。

## 参考源（管理端，已修正）
`D:\frontend\hse-website\src\pages\PermitToWork\ContractorPortal`

## 目标（客户端，需同步）
`D:\frontend\hse-contractor\src\pages\PermitToWork\ContractorPortal`

## 要求
1. 先用 Glob 递归列出两侧目录的所有文件（含子目录）
2. 逐文件完整读取两侧内容，做逐行对比，不要跳过任何文件
3. 找出差异后直接应用到客户端（Edit 或 Write）
4. 管理端有而客户端没有的文件，直接创建
5. 客户端有而管理端没有的文件，保留不动

## 路径适配规则（仅对以下两类 import 做路径替换，其余内容原样同步）
- 管理端 import `ContractorHeader` 的路径 → 客户端改为 `../../../Login/components/ContractorHeader`（因为客户端已将该组件移到 Login 目录）
- 管理端 import `ContractorGuard` 的路径 → 客户端改为对应客户端路径

## 输出要求
逐文件汇报：具体改了哪些内容；没有差异的文件也要明确说明。

and Acceptance', ] const pledgeTranslationKeys = [ 'contractorPortal:pledge.item0', 'contractorPortal:pledge.item1', 'contractorPortal:pledge.item2', 'contractorPortal:pledge.item3', PDF_EXPORT_FILE_NAME_NUDGE = '-5px' /** * html2canvas 绘制文字时用 canvas 文本度量，和浏览器 flex/固定行高盒不完全一致， * 小字号 +「height = line-height」极易出现文字相对背景下沉。 * 策略（仅克隆 DOM）： * 1) 用 padding + line-height ≈ font-size 代替「死高度 + 大行高」居中； * 2) permit-code 内文本包一层 span，translateY 微调（只动字不动背景）； * 3) file-tag：克隆里用 inline-flex 对齐图标与文字；区分图标容器 span / 文件名 span， * 仅对文件名做 translateY，避免原先「两个 span 同位移」导致相对位置不变。 */ const patchContractorPortalDetailPdfClone = (clonedDoc: Document) => { clonedDoc .querySelectorAll('.contractor-portal-detail__permit-code') .forEach((node) => { const el = node as HTMLElement el.style.display = 'inline-block' el.style.alignItems = 'unset' el.style.justifyContent = 'unset' el.style.boxSizing = 'border-box' el.style.height = 'auto' el.style.minHeight = '24px' el.style.fontSize = '10px' el.style.lineHeight = '10px' // 略减上内边距、略增下内边距，配合 translate，抵消「字仍偏下」 el.style.padding = '5px 12px 9px' el.style.verticalAlign = 'middle' let inner = el.querySelector( '[data-pdf-permit-inner]', ) as HTMLElement | null if (!inner) { inner = clonedDoc.createElement('span') inner.setAttribute('data-pdf-permit-inner', '') inner.style.display = 'inline-block' inner.style.lineHeight = '10px' inner.style.fontSize = '10px' while (el.firstChild) { inner.appendChild(el.firstChild) } el.appendChild(inner) } inner.style.transform = `translateY(${PDF_EXPORT_PERMIT_TEXT_NUDGE})` }) clonedDoc .querySelectorAll('.contractor-portal-detail__file-tag') .forEach((node) => { const el = node as HTMLElement el.style.display = 'inline-flex' el.style.flexDirection = 'row' el.style.alignItems = 'center' el.style.justifyContent = 'flex-start' el.style.flexWrap = 'nowrap' el.style.gap = '6px' el.style.boxSizing = 'border-box' el.style.height = 'auto' el.style.minHeight = '30px' el.style.fontSize = '12px' el.style.lineHeight = 'normal' el.style.padding = '9px 10px' el.style.verticalAlign = 'middle' el.querySelectorAll('svg').forEach((svg) => { svg.style.display = 'block' svg.style.flexShrink = '0' svg.style.width = '12px' svg.style.height = '12px' svg.style.margin = '0' svg.style.verticalAlign = 'top' }) Array.from(el.children).forEach((child) => { if (child.tagName.toLowerCase() === 'span') { const span = child as HTMLElement const isIconHolder = !!span.querySelector('svg') if (isIconHolder) { span.style.display = 'inline-flex' span.style.alignItems = 'center' span.style.justifyContent = 'center' span.style.flexShrink = '0' span.style.lineHeight = '0' span.style.transform = 'none' } else { span.style.display = 'inline-block' span.style.flex = '1' span.style.minWidth = '0' span.style.fontSize = '12px' span.style.lineHeight = '12px' span.style.transform = `translateY(${PDF_EXPORT_FILE_NAME_NUDGE})` } } }) }) } const renderFileTag = (file: any) => { return ( {file?.fileName} ) } const ContractorPortalDetail = () => { const { t } = useTranslation(['common', 'contractorPortal']) const [searchParams] = useSearchParams() const urlToken = searchParams.get('token') const [dataInfo, setDataInfo] = useState() const isLanguageAR = getLanguage() === LanguageEnum.AR const permitToWorkTypeText = UsePermitToWorkTypeText() const permitToWorkCategoryText = UsePermitToWorkCategoryText() const { targetRef, exportToPDF } = usePDFExport({ filename: 'contractor_portal_detail', scale: 2, orientation: 'p', format: 'a4', singlePage: false, useWatermark: false, onClone: patchContractorPortalDetailPdfClone, }) const { run: runContractorApprovedDetail, loading: getContractorApprovedDetailLoading, } = useRequest(getContractorApprovedDetail, { manual: true, onSuccess: (res: any) => { setDataInfo(res) }, }) useEffect(() => { runContractorApprovedDetail({ token: urlToken }) }, [runContractorApprovedDetail, urlToken]) if (getContractorApprovedDetailLoading) { return } if (!dataInfo) { return (

3	import { Button } from '@arco-design/web-react'

7	
8	type UploadFileProps = {
9	  className?: string
10	  buttonText?: string
11	  accept?: string
12	  disabled?: boolean
13	  fileUploadType?: number
14	  onUploadSuccess?: (response: any, file: File) => void
15	  onUploadError?: (error: unknown, file: File) => void
16	  urlToken:any
17	}
18	
19	export type UploadFileResponse = {
20	  id?: number
21	  uid?: number
22	  fileName?: string
23	  attachName?: string
24	  url?: string
25	  absUrl?: string
26	  [key: string]: any
27	}

29	const buildUploadFormData = (file: File, fileUploadType: number) => {
30	  const uniqueId = `${Date.now()}${Math.floor(Math.random() * 1000000)}`
31	  const uid = `${Date.now()}${Math.floor(Math.random() * 90000) + 10000}`
32	  const formData = new FormData()
33	  formData.append('file', file)
34	  formData.append('type', String(fileUploadType))
35	  formData.append('uniqueId', uniqueId)
36	  formData.append('uid', uid)
37	  return formData
38	}
39	
40	const UploadFile = ({
41	  className,
42	  buttonText,
43	  accept = '*',
44	  disabled = false,
45	  fileUploadType = 1,
46	  onUploadSuccess,
47	  onUploadError,
48	  urlToken
49	}: UploadFileProps) => {
50	  const inputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement | null>(null)
51	  const [uploading, setUploading] = useState(false)
52	  const { t } = useTranslation(['contractorPortal'])
53	
54	  const handleOpenPicker = () => {
55	    if (disabled || uploading) return
56	    inputRef.current?.click()
57	  }
58	
59	  const handleFileChange = async (event: ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
60	    const file = event.target.files?.[0]
61	    event.target.value = ''
62	    if (!file) return
63	
64	    setUploading(true)
65	    try {
66	      const formData = buildUploadFormData(file, fileUploadType)
67	      const response = await uploadFile(formData, urlToken)
68	      onUploadSuccess?.(response, file)
69	    } catch (error) {
70	      onUploadError?.(error, file)
71	    } finally {
72	      setUploading(false)
73	    }
74	  }
75	
76	  return (
77	    <>
78	      <input
79	        ref={inputRef}
80	        type='file'
81	        accept={accept}
82	        style={{ display: 'none' }}
83	        onChange={handleFileChange}
84	      />
85	      <Button
86	        className={className}
87	        type='secondary'
88	        icon={<IconPlus />}
89	        disabled={disabled || uploading}
90	        loading={uploading}
91	        onClick={handleOpenPicker}
92	      >
93	        {buttonText ?? t('contractorPortal:btn.attachFile')}
94	      </Button>
95	    </>
96	  )
97	}
98	
99	export default UploadFile
